ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock the data belongs to */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* The datetime of the market data */,
  "open_price" TEXT /* The opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" TEXT /* The highest price of the stock during the period */,
  "low_price" TEXT /* The lowest price of the stock during the period */,
  "close_price" TEXT /* The closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* The volume of trades for the stock during the period */,
  "number_of_trades" INTEGER /* The number of trades for the stock during the period */,
  "weighted_avg_price" TEXT /* The weighted average price of the stock during the period */,
  "last_update_time" TEXT /* The last update time for the data entry */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the market data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* The name of the stock */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* The ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "market" TEXT /* The market where the stock is traded */,
  "industry" TEXT /* The industry of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* The sector of the stock */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* The market capitalization of the stock */,
  "currency" TEXT /* The currency in which the stock is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., basic user, premium subscriber, institutional client) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The creation time of the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The last login time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_stocks" (
  "user_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user-stock relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user following the stock */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being followed */,
  "alert_threshold" TEXT /* The threshold for price alerts */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* The frequency of alerts (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_stocks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock related to the notification */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* The time the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* The message content of the notification */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* The type of alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock the data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* The date of the historical market data */,
  "open_price" TEXT /* The opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" TEXT /* The highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" TEXT /* The lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close_price" TEXT /* The closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* The volume of trades for the stock during the day */,
  "adj_close_price" TEXT /* The adjusted closing price */,
  "dividend_amount" TEXT /* The dividend amount for the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being predicted */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* The date of the prediction */,
  "predicted_price" TEXT /* The predicted price of the stock */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* The confidence level of the prediction */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* The version of the model used for prediction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The time the prediction was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading strategy */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* The name of the trading strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trading strategy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The creation time of the strategy */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* The last update time of the strategy */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the strategy (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_strategies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strategy_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading strategy */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The start date of the performance tracking period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The end date of the performance tracking period */,
  "return_on_investment" TEXT /* The return on investment for the strategy during the period */,
  "max_drawdown" TEXT /* The maximum drawdown during the performance period */,
  "sharpe_ratio" TEXT /* The Sharpe ratio of the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strategy_performance_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES trading_strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart configuration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the chart */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being charted */,
  "chart_type" TEXT /* The type of chart (e.g., line, bar, candlestick) */,
  "time_frame" TEXT /* The time frame of the chart (e.g., 1D, 1W, 1M) */,
  "additional_settings" TEXT /* Additional settings for the chart configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The creation time of the chart configuration */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* The last update time of the chart configuration */,
  "shared_status" INTEGER /* Whether the chart is shared with other users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission record */,
  "role" TEXT /* The user role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* The permission granted to the role */,
  "permission_level" INTEGER /* The level of permission (e.g., 1 for basic, 2 for premium, 3 for institutional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES users ("role")
)
